ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "suj_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Location where the shipment originates */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the shipment */,
  "truck_type" TEXT /* Type of truck used for the shipment */,
  "advance_amount" REAL /* Advance payment amount associated with the shipment */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the shipment */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver assigned to the shipment */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Bank account number associated with the payment */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Additional remarks regarding the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the shipment */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the shipment */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., 'in transit', 'delivered') */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route associated with the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suj_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_account_number FOREIGN KEY ("account_number") REFERENCES accounts ("account_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the driver */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the driver (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., CD, FU, PU) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity of the vehicle in tons */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., available, in-use) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle in miles per gallon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_number" TEXT /* Unique account number for each bank account */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "account_holder" TEXT /* Name of the account holder */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the account holder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the account holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Start location of the route */,
  "destination" TEXT /* End location of the route */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "distance_miles" REAL /* Distance of the route in miles */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_logs" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment log */,
  "suj_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipment's SUJ code */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the shipment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_logs_suj_code FOREIGN KEY ("suj_code") REFERENCES shipments ("suj_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log */,
  "suj_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipment's SUJ code */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., 'in transit', 'delivered') */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_status_suj_code FOREIGN KEY ("suj_code") REFERENCES shipments ("suj_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., dispatcher, manager, driver) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., operations, finance) */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the user (e.g., dispatcher, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., shipment update, payment reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
